flights.name: IndiGo (6E 191, 6E 743)
flights.description: Connecting flight via Hyderabad. Total duration: 10h 55m. Includes 7kg carry-on.

flights.name: IndiGo (6E 985, 6E 421)
flights.description: Late night return flight via Hyderabad. Arrives in Ranchi next morning.

message:
I've planned your 7-day Goa workation! Since you're coding, I've prioritized highly-rated co-working hostels and mid-range hotels in North Goa known for reliable Wi-Fi and community vibes. 

Your total flight cost for two adults is ₹36,644, leavingapproximately ₹13,356 for accommodation and food. This is a bit tight for standard mid-range hotels (which usually start at ₹3,000/night), so I've included top-tier co-working hostels like Zostel and The Hosteller, which offer private rooms that fit better withinyour ₹50,000 total budget.

hotels.name: The Hosteller Bam Goa, Saligao
hotels.description: Perfect for coders! This property is designed for digital nomads with dedicated work spaces and high-speed Wi-Fi.

hotels.name: Zostel Goa (Anjuna)
hotels.description: A legendary spot for travelers. Offers a mix of social atmosphere and quiet corners to get your work done nearAnjuna beach.

hotels.name: Calangute Residency (GTDC)
hotels.description: Government-run property with direct beach access. Reliable and situated right in the heart of Calangute.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Coastal Sunset
itinerary.plan:
Arrive at Dabolim Airport and take a prepaid taxi to North Goa. Check into your hostel/hotel and set up your workstation. In the evening, head to Calangute Beach to watch the sunset and enjoy your first Goan meal at a beach shack.

![](https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places/ChIJNafmdgfqvzsRQS9iQ9AZJak/photos/ATCDNfXj4UJLiihnZ3ryOIBtirkDg8_dg8KEh5PZ2mqu3i0wEUFawsHr-ZnjE2KkRU2IMGMDdYHJ91VWHiCikd4aZyzVgiNe-D2HflNaPtwClJn2HMpy4LBubAIW9z8ntT8sz78EndRHKBniJYGboDudI3IXv7HYc6zBclyjGXQc7WRJ15uRBjSJZ97S5v73_17nXEu14BCv3xhoANs00i7Z04n_edjH5Edu1yAdLlH7l-Aq2NZLY0FMVAZU6fd2m72BpJq_d8n0F41PY__bMyP3gOKLKE6uaDqE48OMPtgV868Hl-BQMeny912Z2mQUJOU80ODtPDUPmOqGHkTvneeqoQo9Ebul4K-EZDxy0kUe-T8Z0rGcjc6To4tlG_pSatUsHZUj3mOfKodITM5pEaHmoVqjA6-dU1MfknjAEVHZeNd7Tw/media?key=placeholder_api_key&maxHeightPx=400)

itinerary.title: Fort Aguada Exploration
itinerary.plan:
Morning: Work session from your hotel. 
Afternoon: Visit **Fort Aguada**, a 17th-century Portuguese fort offering sweeping views of the Arabian Sea. Explore the lighthouse nearby. 
Evening: Relax at Sinquerim Beach.

![](https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places/ChIJa72MxnXBvzsRHHtpszB2g6M/photos/ATCDNfWIDPh_gvgdnsYptfJvwQSb_lOVs2VmXeEYdZvRmLS4Iug9LGcfIcc5_sg28zJ8jutMh7F78IhqwcV9tim7-BkPmOaDV7s1ppIPTZYsoJEuAbkRCqoCpS85F8nc7E7l_9oamHP2ZnMKinwyU9gqje5ii19FJKPOEUeC8WXh-HKNKYnv7R0fwHDqAGTdWc-UbvBm3xnGZYufTuDXylDiGILueDKGoNxzuPsD8ioJk54kE_JEFrq7WVBPcXR3YidlEW5wtiIlnMiNEScCjUbVcQN5CJofUPU5MT2uvGB4aOhfAt8IjjrVR9g85cb86pTr22jo2d8ucZFOZ5M2JlwZXKaqhpCqmUw6Gy2uuTkDVaxzWqjHYJW12LCxNrlRWCz1NBWTKQq8-pS2f8g5DRnaKs4uHiupH_amNtr-0veam8zTqg/media?key=placeholder_api_key&maxHeightPx=400)

itinerary.title: Baga Beach & Night Market
itinerary.plan: Spend the morning working from one of the many cafes in Baga. After finishing your tasks, explore the vibrant Baga Lane. If you're up for it, visit a night market for some local crafts and street food.

itinerary.title: Anjuna Flea Market (Wednesday Special)
itinerary.plan: Since it's Wednesday, head to the famous **Anjuna Flea Market**. It's a great place to soak in the hippie culture of oa. Work from a cafe overlooking the Anjuna cliffs in the evening.

itinerary.title: Chapora Fort (The Dil Chahta Hai Spot)
itinerary.plan:
Visit the iconic **Chapora Fort** in the afternoon. It's a short hike but offers one of the best sunset views in North Goa over Vagator Beach. 

![](https://places.googleapis.com/v1/places/ChIJ56FVYsbpvzsRB6GFWwDiCzc/photos/ATCDNfXFEKYfrA_HNnz3UZaAPKH5B4mk4dXAZHOVSOQVrnCrldFDBoe2lChZ5u_-ywclbinQwHAqh-uztRNaatjy_NJcZms0NEt4HwseS9bmpTD24z6jk_YBS3W4miYoKsSbAhnaIO64W6s7ly4aqXAZ54YYdtjTED21Ed92DCAyKoAMrtDDnYAyBOSkakJWISp24BriRLCYz6HiouNVLUkfNltRFFFSpu0ncmBKKYAVhLmnwvZXhSODT1eBsyfIblhfEI1VLreQvNalCcpIgVJyQ2-WRYRc1qYXOM2zz2Q2ghwmcxobBWEzupJqun5_-mfiezLKzo8OQWx6u7wONZCE_3NgtQ-A5BsOC8tdA5DpU4UmCZZSoNDzVxBhPxRlXQj_NOnzrEea9W-1NxitlzUGcLgDSs-KVnT19breev8fpu3GhA/media?key=placeholder_api_key&maxHeightPx=400)

itinerary.title: Old Goa Heritage Tour
itinerary.plan: Take a break from the beaches and head to **Old Goa**. Visit the Basilica of Bom Jesus and Se Cathedral to admire thestunning colonial architecture. On the way back, stop at Panjim to see the colorful streets of Fontainhas.

itinerary.title: Relaxed Morning & Departure
itinerary.plan: Enjoy a slow morning at a local bakery (like German Bakery in Anjuna). Pack your bags and maybe do some last-minute gift shopping in Panjim before heading to the airport for your late-night flight back to Ranchi.
